message:
🌱 Add vllm: [Feature]: Support openai responses API interface mission (#843)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vllm-14721-feature-support-openai-responses-api-interface",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vllm: Support OpenAI Responses API interface",
+    "description": "Add support for the OpenAI Responses API interface in vLLM, keeping compatibility with OpenAI's latest API updates. Requested by 52+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vLLM setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vLLM version and configuration:\n```bash\npip show vllm | grep Version\n# or\npython -c \"import vllm; print(vllm.__version__)\"\n```\nThe Responses API support requires a recent version of vLLM."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the Responses API",
+        "description": "OpenAI released a new Responses API that extends the existing completions and chat completions endpoints. vLLM needed to add compatibility with this API to stay in sync with OpenAI's updates. The Responses API provides a unified interface for handling multi-turn conversations with tool use."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade vLLM to a version with Responses API support",
+        "description": "Install or upgrade vLLM to get the Responses API support:\n```bash\npip install vllm --upgrade\n```\nThe Responses API implementation was added via PR #20504 in the vLLM repository."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Start the vLLM server",
+        "description": "Launch the vLLM OpenAI-compatible API server:\n```bash\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n  --model <your-model-name>\n```\nThe server exposes the Responses API endpoint alongside the existing completions and chat completions endpoints."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the Responses API works",
+        "description": "Test the Responses API endpoint:\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/v1/responses \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"model\": \"<your-model>\", \"input\": \"Explain quantum computing in one sentence.\"}'\n```\nYou should receive a response in the OpenAI Responses API format."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "vLLM added support for the OpenAI Responses API interface, enabling compatibility with OpenAI's latest API format. This allows users to use the Responses API endpoint alongside existing completions and chat completions endpoints when serving models with vLLM.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Start vLLM with Responses API support\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --model <your-model>",
+        "# Test using Llama Stack with vLLM backend\npodman run --rm -it \\\n  --network=host \\\n  --env VLLM_URL=\"http://localhost:8000\" \\\n  --env INFERENCE_MODEL=\"RedHatAI/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct-FP8\" \\\n  docker.io/llamastack/distribution-remote-vllm"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vllm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "feature",
+      "openai-api",
+      "responses-api"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "vllm"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/14721",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm"
+    },
+    "reactions": 52,
+    "comments": 28,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "python",
+      "pip"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.8+, pip, a CUDA-capable GPU, and a working vLLM installation (pip install vllm)."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:44:48.688Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
